events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His legendary guitar riffs shaped a generation and continue to inspire.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young! Mick Jagger still proves that age is just a number when it comes to rock and roll. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, famously kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, but what a moment for music culture!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, marking a pivotal moment for Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis gave us 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that defined a generation and cemented their place in rock history. Pure Britpop brilliance.

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival of Music & Art took place on this day in 1969, an iconic event in music history.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an unforgettable moment in cultural history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91, on the 49th anniversary of his passing.

angles.name: King of Rock 'n' Roll
angles.copy: 49 years since the world lost the King. Elvis Presley's influence remains as powerful as ever. Forever missed, never forgotten.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55, on the 30th anniversary of his tragic death.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a voice that resonated globally. Tupac Shakur's music and message continue to inspire. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84, on the 56th anniversary of his passing.

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost a true innovator. Jimi Hendrix redefined what was possible on the guitar and left an indelible mark on music.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969, featuring that legendary album cover.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles dropped 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is pure art, let alone the timeless music within.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice and style that are utterly unmistakable.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis co-founder and rock 'n' roll star Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy birthday to Liam Gallagher – always keeping it rock and roll. What's your top track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine in 1971
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and hope that still resonates deeply today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit 1000 songs in your pocket? 25 years since the original iPod changed how we listened to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Celebrating James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and his incredible 64-year cinematic legacy. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: A True Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we honour the enduring legacy of John Lennon. A voice for peace and a musical genius.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is truly timeless.
